command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; cat .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "(no result yet)"; done
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read sf; do echo "$(basename $sf): wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf") cursor=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$sf") aid=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id' "$sf")"; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "--- $w ---"; cat .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "(no result)"; done
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read sf; do echo "$(basename $sf): wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf") cursor=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$sf") status=$(jq -r '.status' "$sf")"; done

WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.885/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775773627_495.json" && engine_init "workflows/tests/team-static.json" "$STATE_FILE" && HOOK_INPUT='{"session_id":"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a","teammate_name":"worker-1","team_name":"test-static-team","hook_event_name":"TeammateIdle"}' && echo "=== Before ===" && jq '.teams["create-team"].teammates["worker-1"].status' "$STATE_FILE" && echo "=== Dispatching ===" && engine_handle_hook "teammate_idle" "$HOOK_INPUT" 2>&1 && echo "=== After ===" && jq '.teams["create-team"].teammates["worker-1"].status' "$STATE_FILE"

jq '{cursor: .cursor, teammates: .teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries | map({name: .key, status: .value.status}), steps: [.steps[] | {id: .id, status: .status}]}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775773627_495.json
